query_title: Superman II: The Richard Donner Cut

recommendations.title: Lethal Weapon 2
recommendations.overview: Riggs and Murtaugh are on the trail of South African diplomats using their immunity to engage in criminal activities.

recommendations.title: Timeline
recommendations.overview: A group of archaeological students become trapped in the past when they go there to retrieve their professor. The group must survive in 14th century France long enough to be rescued.

recommendations.title: Superman
recommendations.overview: Mild-mannered Clark Kent works as a reporter at the Daily Planet alongside his crush, Lois Lane. Clark must summon his superhero alter-ego when the nefarious Lex Luthor launches a plan to take over the world.

recommendations.title: 16 Blocks
recommendations.overview: An aging cop is assigned the ordinary task of escorting a fast-talking witness from police custody to a courthouse, but they find themselves running the gauntlet as other forces try to prevent them from getting there.

recommendations.title: Lethal Weapon
recommendations.overview: A veteran cop and an unstable detective become partners who must put their differences aside in order to bring down a heroin-smuggling ring run by ex-Special Forces.

recommendations.title: Conspiracy Theory
recommendations.overview: A man obsessed with conspiracy theories becomes a target after one of his theories turns out to be true. Unfortunately, in order to save himself, he has to figure out which theory it is.

recommendations.title: Lethal Weapon 3
recommendations.overview: Riggs and Murtaugh pursue a former officer who uses his knowledge of police procedure and policies to steal and sell confiscated guns and ammunition to local street gangs.

recommendations.title: Lethal Weapon 4
recommendations.overview: With personal crises and age weighing in on them, Riggs and Murtaugh must contend with deadly Chinese triads trying to free their former leaders from prison and onto American soil.

recommendations.title: The Omen
recommendations.overview: Immediately after their miscarriage, the US diplomat Robert Thorn adopts the newborn Damien without the knowledge of his wife. Yet what he doesn’t know is that their new son is the son of the devil.

recommendations.title: The Goonies
